title: Government Says No to High Oil Prices
summary: The government is telling energy companies to stop making too much money from high oil prices. Ed Miliband, the Energy Secretary, says they will not allow companies to charge too much for petrol and heating oil. Oil prices have gone up because of a war in Iran, making bills higher for people. The government might help by keeping fuel taxes low. Some companies say they need to raise prices, but the government wants to focus on clean energy like nuclear power to make energy cheaper and safer in the future. They are also talking to petrol sellers to make sure prices are fair.

keywords.explanation: the group of people who run the country
the cost of oil, which affects petrol and heating costs
businesses that sell petrol and heating oil
energy from sources like nuclear power that don't pollute

questions.question: Who is telling energy companies to stop making too much money?
What has caused oil prices to go up?
What might the government do to help with high fuel prices?
What type of energy does the government want to focus on for the future?
options: More oil from the North Sea

questions.question: Who is talking to the government about petrol prices?
Why does the government want clean energy?
options: To make energy cheaper and safer
To help companies make more money
questions.correct_answer: To make energy cheaper and safer

background_read: Oil is a natural resource used for fuel in cars and heating homes. When there is a war or other problems, oil prices can go up, making things more expensive. The government tries to control prices to help people. Clean energy, like from the sun or nuclear power, is better for the environment and can be more stable in price.
Article_Structure: WHO: Ed Miliband and the government
WHAT: They are stopping energy companies from charging too much for oil
WHERE: In the UK, affecting petrol stations and homes
WHY: To help people with high bills and promote clean energy

perspectives.description: The government wants to prevent high prices and focus on clean energy.
Some companies say they need to raise prices due to high costs.
